# OneNest

> Data-intelligent shared retail hubs for independent brands inside the UK's biggest shopping centres.

OneNest gives independent brands a curated kiosk inside major UK shopping centres from around £600/month — high-street presence without the overhead of a full lease. The first hub launches in Newcastle in 2027.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, concept, roadmap, locations, and waitlist for shared retail hubs.
